hygiene_controls.description: Public files must not contain secrets, tokens, auth values, provider keys, Feishu app secrets, broker credentials, private keys, or sensitive assignment values.
Public files must avoid absolute local user or volume paths and exact live runtime fingerprints.
Public files must not include URLs with embedded user credential material.
Only local_private placeholders may be committed; private detail artifacts stay untracked.
Audit outputs keep public sanitized summaries in reports and private detail under local_private.
hygiene_controls.verification: docs/public_repo_policy.md plus public repo hygiene scan

hygiene_controls.description: Run public repo hygiene, secret, forbidden-surface, ETF-universe, safety, smoke, and diff checks before pushing.

manual_trading_note: Final trading is manually decided by the user.

risk_agent_review.scope: public repo hygiene policy; no trade ticket or actionable trade suggestion generated
